program_en: B.Ed. in Mathematics and Mathematics Education
program_chi: 數學及數學教育教育學士
study_scheme:
Mathematics and Mathematics Education Mathematics and Mathematics Education Applicable to students admitted in 2023-24
Major Programme Requirement
Students
are required to complete a minimum of 102 units of courses as follows:
Units
1.  |  Faculty Package:
Faculty of Education  |  6
EDUC2120, 2312
Faculty of Science  |  3
MATH1010/1018[a] or 1030/1038[a]
2.  |  Required Courses:
(a)  |  Subject Knowledge  |  26
MATH1010/1018[a] or 1030/1038[a], 1050/1058,
2010/2018, 2020/2028, 2040/2048, 2050/2058, 2070/2078, 2221, 2230
(b)  |  Pedagogy[b]  |  21
BMED3011, 3021, 3031, 3051, 3071, 3081,
3091
(c)  |  Educational Studies  |  10
EDUC2240, 3201, 3311, 4340
(d)  |  Teaching Practice  |  10
EDUC4030, 4040
(e)  |  Research Experience  |  6
BMED4510[c], 4520[c]
3.  |  Elective Courses:
(a)  |  18 units of Subject Knowledge
courses chosen from (i) OR (i) and (ii):  |  18
(i)  |  MATH2060/2068, MATH courses at 3000
or above level except MATH4400 and 4900
(ii)  |  9 units of courses chosen from one
of the following subject areas: CSCI, ECON, PHYS, STAT
(b)  |  Educational Studies  |  2
2 units of course chosen from the
following:
EDUC2210, 2220, 3140, 3150, 3200, 3260,
3270, 3280, 3290, 4110, 4131, 4320, 4330
Total:  |  102
Explanatory Notes:
1.  |  BMED, CSCI, ECON, EDUC, MATH, PHYS and STAT courses at 2000
and above level as included in the Major Programme Requirement will be
included in the calculation of Major GPA for honours classification.
[a]  |  Both MATH1010/1018 and 1030/1038 are required courses.
Students taking MATH1010/1018 as a Faculty Package course should take
MATH1030/1038 to fulfill requirement 2(a) and vice versa.
[b]  |  Subject to approval of the Programme Director, BMED4910 and
4920 can be used to substitute two of the required courses under
Pedagogy.
[c]  |  Capstone courses
